description:
Your simple video editor for creating wow videos

Your simple video editor for creating wow videos
- Easily create clips for your socials, business, or family
- Boost your videos with one-click auto subtitles and other AI tools
- Choose from hundreds of titles, transitions, and music tracks
- The Auto сrop tool is now faster and adjusts both your video and project aspect ratio in one pass. Quickly transform horizontal clips into Reels, Shorts, vlog teasers, and more, all while automatically keeping the main subject perfectly in frame – whether it’s a person, a product, or your beloved pet.
